title: AI super-cycle fuels a boom in China's exports, imports as chip sales more than double
description: China’s exports and imports expanded rapidly in May, topping forecasts as a global investment supercycle in artificial intelligence drives up prices and demand for hardware made by the world’s manufacturing powerhouse.
content:

title: TCS to have as many AI agents as human employees in next 3 years: N Chandrasekaran
